content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4:
   107	    :   [1-9]
   108	    ;
   109	
   110	fragment
   111	OctalDigit
   112	    :   [0-7]
   113	    ;
   114	
   115	// Single-line comments
   116	SingleLineComment
   117	    :   '//' ~[\r\n]*
   118	        -> skip
   119	    ;
   120	
   121	// Multi-line comments
   122	MultiLineComment
   123	    :   '/*' .*? '*/'
   124	        -> skip
   125	    ;
   126	
   127	// 预处理信息处理，可以从预处理信息中获得文件名以及行号
   128	// 预处理信息中的第一个数字即为行号
   129	LineAfterPreprocessing
   130	    :   '#' Whitespace* ~[\r\n]*
   131	        -> skip
   132	    ;
   133	
   134	Whitespace
   135	    :   [ \t]+
   136	        -> skip
   137	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
